evidence.description: Logged-in Sequencing.com marketplace showed 164 visible marketplace card positions across 3 pages of 75, 75, and 14 cards. The captured cards include repeated slugs, so this evidence confirms the observed marketplace slot count, not 164 unique recovered names.
Public aggregate marketplace HTML exposed 150 unique /marketplace/ URLs.
Authenticated screenshots identified four additional cards not represented as public aggregate URLs.

authenticatedBrowserCapture.method: Logged-in in-app browser DOM card extraction through visible pagination controls.
authenticatedBrowserCapture.finding: The authenticated UI confirms 164 visible marketplace card positions. This capture confirms the four named authenticated-only entries already modeled, but does not identify the ten placeholder slots.

policy.replacementRule: Replace a placeholder only after authenticated page, SSR JSON, screenshot, or detail-page evidence identifies the actual report name and metadata.
policy.rawGenomeBoundary: Coverage tracking contains no raw genome data.
